# Integration Workflow Test - End-to-End MCP Interaction
# Demonstrates: multi-step workflows, state progression, complete server interaction

# Step 1: Initialize connection
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"IntegrationTest","version":"1.0"}}}
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"protocolVersion":'

# Step 2: List available tools
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}
stdout '"tools":'
stdout '"name":'

# Step 3: Get tool details (verify tool listing contains valid tools)
stdout '"inputSchema":'

# Step 4: Verify complete workflow responses are valid JSON-RPC
stdout '"jsonrpc":"2.0"'
stdout '"id":'

# Step 5: Verify no unexpected errors occurred throughout
! stdout '"error":.*"message":"internal'

# Step 6: All responses should be properly formatted
! stdout 'null.*null.*null'

# Step 7: State should be consistent
stdout '"result":'
